leadText: Iron Defense redirects here. For the Pokémon Battle e card pack, see Iron Defense (Battle e). Iron Defense (Japanese: てっぺき Iron Wall) is a non-damaging Steel-type move introduced in Generation III. It is: TR46 in Pokémon Sword and Shield. TM104 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet. TM080 in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 Generation VIII 1.1.1 Pokémon Legends: Arceus 1.2 Generation IX 1.2.1 Pokémon Legends: Z-A Effect [ edit | edit source ] Iron Defense raises the user's Defense stat by two stages. If powered up by a Steelium Z into Z-Iron Defense, all of the user's lowered stats are reset. Generation VIII [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Legends: Arceus [ edit | edit source ] Iron Defense's PP has been increased to 20, and it raises the user's defensive stats for five turns. sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description R S E Colo XD Hardens the body's surface to sharply raise Defense . FR LG The user hardens its body's surface to sharply raise its Defense stat. D P Pt HG SS PBR B W B2 W2 X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP The user hardens its body's surface like iron, sharply raising its Defense stat. LA The user hardens its body's surface like iron, raising its defensive stats. S V The user hardens its body's surface like iron, sharply boosting its Defense stat. ZA The user boosts its Defense stat for a while by hardening the surface of its body until it becomes like iron.
